A.does: Applies all pending state updates in a fiber's update queue (in priority lane order) to compute the new derived state for that fiber during rendering.

B.does: Resets the reconciler's work loop state and creates a fresh work-in-progress root fiber before starting or restarting a render pass on a FiberRoot.

comparison: processUpdateQueue is invoked per-fiber during beginWork to fold queued updates into new state, whereas prepareFreshStack is invoked once before the render loop itself begins (or is retried) to reset global work loop bookkeeping.
